What Tyler Offers

Massage services built around you

Every session starts with a conversation about what hurts, what's tight, and what your goals are. No upsells, no fluff.

Deep Tissue Massage

Focused, firm pressure targeting chronic knots and tension deep in the muscle. Ideal for people who sit at a desk all day, athletes recovering from training, or anyone carrying stress in their shoulders and back.

Swedish Massage

Long, flowing strokes that improve circulation and melt away stress. The go-to for relaxation and general wellness.

Sports Massage

Pre- and post-event work that targets the muscle groups you use most. Faster recovery, better range of motion, fewer injuries.

Custom Wellness Session

A blended approach — Tyler combines techniques based on what your body needs that day. No two sessions are alike.

Meet Your Therapist

Tyler Smith

Tyler brings years of hands-on experience and a genuine passion for helping people move and feel better. His approach is direct, personalized, and results-driven.

Read Tyler's Story

Why clients keep coming back

It's not just about the hour on the table. Tyler takes time to understand your pain points, tracks your progress session to session, and adjusts his approach as your body changes. That kind of attention is rare — and it's why most of his clients are referrals.

See packages & pricing →

Ready to feel the difference?

Choose a package that fits your needs and book your first session with Tyler.
